---
title: "End of 2024: 2,375 Miles, 18 Marathons, 4 50Ks"
description: "End-of-year retrospective: 2,375.4 miles in 2024, 18 full marathons (5 races) and 4 50K runs, with PRs from 5K to 50K and a 34.5-mile max."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-12-31"
categories: [running, marathon, 50K, ultra, year in review, video, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Watch the end-of-year run on YouTube. [Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/JT1Lis39aHk)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

The rain stopped on this last day of 2024, so I took a 15K easy run on the beautiful Sammamish River Trali to close out the year.

2024 has been great for my running: overall I clocked in at 2,375.4 miles (EG 67,456ft), including 18 full marathon (5 were races) and 4 50K runs. I've earned many PRs ranging from 5K to 50K, and extended my range to 34.5 miles. I didn't get BQ though, but there's always next year!

Happy new year!


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_running-marathon-activity-7280057712317550592-9eQG).*
